overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red hoodie walking through a futuristic urban downtown. The journey progresses from shaded sidewalks beneath elevated highways, past towering megastructures and corporate towers with satellite dishes, along a sunlit waterfront promenade, and finally into a dark underpass. The environment features dense futuristic infrastructure, holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: character approaches street corner and begins to turn right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shaded sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching an intersection corner

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-level highway infrastructure casting shadows over the street
steep concrete on-ramp with red painted curb
distant view of massive industrial building with 06 marking visible between structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway interchange. The area is partially shaded with sparse pedestrian traffic. A child in red walks ahead as the character approaches a corner, with the distant megastructure building 06 becoming visible through the infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with view of towering megastructures

events.description: exits shaded underpass area into open plaza with full sky visibility
camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the massive building 06 megastructure

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and looking up at the massive megastructure, revealing the scale of the industrial architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink beanie walking alongside the character

entered.detail: tall industrial tower with large 06 numerals painted on the side
glowing holographic advertisements floating above distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the shaded underpass into an open intersection, revealing the massive scale of the industrial megastructures. The camera tilts up to show building 06 towering overhead, while holographic advertisements glow in the distance. A pedestrian in a pink beanie walks alongside as the character surveys the architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with corporate towers and satellite arrays

events.description: panning left reveals the cylindrical Kiroshi corporate tower and satellite dish arrays

agents.ego_description: turning left to face the Kiroshi corporate district, observing the cylindrical tower and large satellite dishes

notable_agents.action: blue utility truck driving along the street in the background

entered.detail: tall cylindrical corporate tower with vertical KIROSHI signage and large advertisement banners
cluster of massive satellite dishes mounted on building rooftops
contemporary building with reflective glass surfaces and corporate logos

segments.scene_description: The character turns to reveal the Kiroshi corporate plaza, dominated by a cylindrical tower with vertical signage and massive satellite dishes. The area features modern glass architecture and moderate vehicle traffic, including a blue truck passing by. The scene transitions from industrial megastructures to a more commercial corporate district.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with distant harbor and mountain views

events.description: turning right to follow the palm-lined promenade toward the waterfront
distant mountains and harbor cranes become visible as the character approaches the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, with views of distant mountains and harbor infrastructure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city
industrial shipping cranes at the waterfront port facility
concrete wall covered in colorful purple and green graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees, transitioning from the dense corporate district to a more open harbor area. Distant mountains and industrial shipping cranes are visible on the horizon. A pedestrian in a yellow jacket passes by in the opposite direction as the character moves past a colorful graffiti-covered wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: street underpass beneath multi-level highway interchange

events.description: entering deep shadow as the character approaches the underpass beneath the highway
large military-style armored truck drives past on the adjacent street
entering the dark covered walkway beneath the highway ramps

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and entering a dark underpass beneath the highway, passing other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: large military truck with multiple axles driving past on the road
group of pedestrians walking ahead into the dark underpass tunnel

entered.detail: dark tunnel formed by overlapping highway ramps and concrete supports
illuminated street lamps lining the sidewalk under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character turns back toward the street and enters a dark underpass beneath the highway interchange. The lighting shifts dramatically to low light as a large military truck passes by on the road. The character follows a group of pedestrians into the covered walkway, with concrete walls and overhead highway structures enclosing the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shaded depths of an industrial underpass into the bright, towering expanse of a corporate district. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway interchange, following a child in red toward a distant megastructure. As the character emerges from the shadows into an open intersection, the camera tilts upward to reveal the overwhelming scale of building 06 and glowing holographic advertisements. The scene then shifts from these industrial monoliths toward the Kiroshi corporate plaza, where the architecture transforms into modern glass facades. Finally, the view opens up to a cylindrical tower adorned with vertical signage and massive satellite dishes as a blue truck passes through the bustling commercial hub.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins with the character walking past palm trees and a colorful graffiti-covered wall, moving away from the corporate district toward a harbor area where industrial shipping cranes and distant mountains line the horizon. As a pedestrian in a yellow jacket passes by, the camera follows the character turning away from the sunlit coast and back toward the street. The scene then shifts dramatically in lighting as the character enters a dark underpass beneath a highway interchange, passing a large military truck on the road. Finally, the environment closes in with heavy concrete walls and overhead structures as the character follows a group of pedestrians deeper into the covered walkway.
